items.title: Indigo invests in air-taxi maker Sarla Aviation
items.summary: The move puts the airline company in the growing air-taxi segment in India after a prior partnership with US-based Archer Aviation reportedly fell through.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: DeepL, known for text translation, now wants to translate your voice
items.summary: DeepL says its tech could be used for real-time translation with meeting tools like Zoom and Microsoft Teams
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
